name: Mandarin Hot and Sour Soup
recipeIngredient: 3 tablespoons Cornstarch mixed with 3 tablespoons water
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring the soup stock to a boil.
2. Add shredded pork, black mushrooms, and wood ears (if using). Cook for 2-3 minutes.
3. Add the remaining ingredients and seasonings, except cornstarch, eggs, and green onion. Reduce heat and simmer for 2 minutes.
4. Thicken the soup with the cornstarch mixture by stirring continuously until desired consistency is reached. Turn off the heat.
5. Slowly pour in the beaten eggs in a thin stream while stirring to incorporate into the soup.
6. Garnish with chopped green onion.
7. If preparing the soup ahead of time, do not add cornstarch and eggs until serving. Adjust the hotness by varying the amount of white pepper and the sourness by using different amounts of vinegar. Serve immediately.
